message:
feat(Lib): Implement runpy, trace, nturl2path, tabnanny, py_compile modules

- runpy: Locate and run Python modules as scripts (-m flag support)
- trace: Program execution tracing and coverage reporting
- nturl2path: Convert between Windows paths and file:// URLs
- tabnanny: Detect mixed tabs/spaces indentation issues
- py_compile: Compile Python source files to bytecode
